# Public explorer URL shapes (synthetic addresses).
https://tonviewer.com/EQAbcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890AbC
https://tonviewer.com/nft/EQAbcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890AbC
https://tonscan.org/address/EQAbcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890AbC
https://tonscan.org/nft/EQAbcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890AbC
https://tonapi.io/v2/nfts/EQAbcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890AbC
